experiments.title: Oracle baseline
experiments.description: Sanity check: oracle + random baselines only. Oracle should get ~100% success, random ~0%. Confirms the env is sound.

experiments.title: PPO + curriculum (5 seeds)
experiments.description: PPO with start-radius curriculum (20 → 50 over 150 eps), bigger rollouts, 5 seeds. 2 landmarks × 5 seeds × 300 eps.

experiments.title: Direction-scale diagnostic
experiments.description: Does amplifying the direction-to-target signal rescue PPO from its random-like performance?

experiments.title: Direction-scale sweep
experiments.description: Sweep direction scale to find the sweet spot for PPO. dirScale ∈ {10, 30, 100} × 2 landmarks × 3 seeds × 300 eps.

experiments.title: Long training run
experiments.description: Long training run at dirScale=10 to see PPO asymptote. 2 landmarks × 3 seeds × 1000 eps.

experiments.title: Multi-scale observation
experiments.description: Compare PPO flat with strides=[1] vs strides=[1,4] (multi-scale observation). dirScale=10.

experiments.title: Single-scale control (600 ep)
experiments.description: Matched-budget control for the multi-scale comparison: PPO flat with strides=[1], 600 episodes, 3 seeds, dirScale=10.

experiments.title: Predicted goal-vector vs oracle
experiments.description: End-to-end test of the goal-vector CNN: the trained network replaces the env's oracle direction signal. PPO, 2 landmarks × 3 seeds × 300 eps.

experiments.title: Predicted goal-vector (wide-FOV)
experiments.description: Same as predicted-vs-oracle, but using the hierarchical 15^3 / strides=[1,2,4] goal-vector network trained on Theia (val. cosine 0.9968).

experiments.title: Oracle baseline (AOMIC sub-0083)
experiments.description: Oracle direction-vector baseline on the AOMIC test subject. Mirrors predicted-vs-oracle.json hyperparams exactly — only the goal-vector source differs.
